campbell.title: Campbell City Council — April 21, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss updating the city's business license tax rates for the upcoming fiscal year. Shannon Dragman from the finance department presented the proposed changes to the council, who then debated the new rates and made a decision on whether to approve them.
keyTopics: Business license tax rates being increased or adjusted
Annual financial update from the finance department
Changes to Campbell Municipal Code regarding business taxes
Council vote on new tax rates for the fiscal year

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026 to get community input on a new rule or policy. After hearing from residents, the council decided to move forward by skipping the usual first reading step and putting the ordinance directly on the consent calendar so it can be officially approved at the next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held to gather resident feedback
Ordinance fast-tracked, skipping standard first reading process
Item scheduled for final adoption at next council meeting
Council streamlined approval process using consent calendar

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 21, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 21, 2026, to approve meeting minutes from their previous session and review the city's finances for February. The council also authorized the town manager to sign contracts for construction work and professional services, though the specific projects aren't fully detailed in the agenda.
keyTopics: Approved previous meeting minutes from April 7
Reviewed city's February 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized construction contracts with QLM, Inc. and other contractors
Approved three-year professional services agreement

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 29, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting on April 29, 2026 to organize upcoming council sessions. They reviewed and made changes to the agenda for the May 5 meeting, scheduled specific items for particular times if needed, and checked whether any agenda items required special notice waivers. They also previewed the draft agenda for May 12 and reviewed public records from mid-to-late April.
keyTopics: Finalized the May 5, 2026 council meeting agenda
Scheduled specific 'time certain' items for the May 5 meeting
Reviewed upcoming May 12, 2026 draft agenda
Checked public records from April 16-23, 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 30, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met to approve meeting minutes and hear directly from residents about their concerns. The main focus was reviewing neighborhood grant requests and deciding which community projects should receive funding for the 2026-27 fiscal year.
keyTopics: Neighborhood grant funding decisions for 2026-27
Public comments and concerns from residents
Neighborhood meeting attendance and engagement
Meeting minutes approval

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 28, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special evening meeting on April 28, 2026, primarily to interview candidates for various city boards and commissions. Residents had the opportunity to provide public comments both in person and online during the session.
keyTopics: Board and Commission candidate interviews
Public comment period (in-person and online)
Special study session format

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 30, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met on April 30, 2026, to approve meeting notes from the Economic Development Committee's January and March sessions. The council also opened the floor for residents to speak about any local issues for up to three minutes each, though the council generally cannot make decisions on topics not officially listed on the agenda.
keyTopics: Approval of Economic Development Committee meeting minutes from January 2026
Approval of Economic Development Committee meeting minutes from March 2026
Public comment period for residents on local matters
Clarification that decisions on unlisted topics are limited by state law

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council met to discuss allowing large graphic signs to be put on buildings around Levi's Stadium temporarily during the 2026 FIFA World Cup events. The council also approved a new employment agreement with the city's firefighters union covering 2026-2029. One item on the agenda was withdrawn and not discussed.
keyTopics: Temporary large signs around Levi's Stadium for World Cup 2026
New firefighters union contract for 2026-2029
One agenda item withdrawn by staff before discussion

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 21, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on April 21, 2026 to discuss tax policies, approve the next fiscal year's budget and development plans, and address homelessness in the community. The council reviewed and approved official meeting minutes and looked ahead to upcoming agenda items.
keyTopics: Tax Equity and Fiscal Responsibility Act reissuance
FY 2026-27 budget and development spending plans
User fees and service charges updates
Santa Clara County homelessness prevention strategy
Upcoming city council meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 29, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to discuss several items including routine administrative matters and a major development proposal. The main focus was a request to subdivide a vacant 1-acre property on Old Trace Road into nine separate lots to build nine new houses and seven smaller accessory dwelling units on a new private street.
keyTopics: Proposed subdivision of 4103 Old Trace Road creating 9 single-family homes plus 7 smaller units
Election of new Council Chair and Vice Chair
Meeting schedule and work assignments for council members
Property zoned as Residential Estate with environmental review exemption
